name: config
description:
Manage Azure CLI configuration.

		Available since Azure CLI 2.10.0

args.name: <KEY>
args.description: The configuration to get. If not provided, all sections and configurations will be listed. If section is provided, all configurations under the specified section will be listed. If <section>.<key> is provided, only the corresponding configuration is shown

options.name: --local
options.description: Include local configuration. Scan from the working directory up to the root drive, then the global configuration and return the first occurrence

args.name: <KEY_VALUE>
args.description: Space-separated configurations in the form of .=

options.name: --local
options.description: Set as a local configuration in the working directory

args.name: <KEY>
args.description: The configuration to unset, in the form of

options.name: --local
options.description: Include local configuration. Scan from the working directory up to the root drive, then the global configuration and unset the first occurrence

args.name: <NAME>
args.description: Space-separated list of parameter persistence names. Either positional name argument or --all can be specified

options.name: --all
options.description: Clear all parameter persistence data. Either positional name argument or --all can be specified

options.name: --purge
options.description: Delete parameter persistence file from working directory. Only available when --all is specified

options.name: --recursive
options.description: Indicate this is recursive delete of parameter persistence. Only available when --all is specified

name: --yes
-y
options.description: Do not prompt for confirmation. Only available when --all is specified

args.name: <NAME>
args.description: Space-separated list of parameter persistence names
